steps.title: Match to the answer choices
steps.content: The simplified expression is $19x^2-133$. That matches choice A — A is correct.

steps.title: Use the source rationale
steps.content: Choice A is correct. The expression $19\left({x}^{2}-7\right)$ can be rewritten as $19\left({x}^{2}\right)-19\left(7\right)$, which is equivalent to $19{x}^{2}-133$.
